## Download

| Platform | File |
|----------|------|
| macOS (Apple Silicon) | `Tuttle-__VERSION__-macOS-arm64.dmg` |
| Windows | `Tuttle-__VERSION__-Windows-Setup.exe` |
| Linux (Ubuntu/Debian) | `Tuttle-__VERSION__-Linux-amd64.deb` |
| Linux (Fedora/RHEL) | `Tuttle-__VERSION__-Linux-x86_64.rpm` |
| Linux (other) | `Tuttle-__VERSION__-Linux-x86_64.AppImage` |

<details><summary>ARM64 Linux</summary>

| Platform | File |
|----------|------|
| Linux ARM64 (Ubuntu/Debian) | `Tuttle-__VERSION__-Linux-arm64.deb` |
| Linux ARM64 (Fedora/RHEL) | `Tuttle-__VERSION__-Linux-aarch64.rpm` |
| Linux ARM64 (other) | `Tuttle-__VERSION__-Linux-arm64.AppImage` |

</details>

> Other files in the asset list (`.yml`, `.blockmap`, `.zip`) are for automatic updates and can be ignored.
